message:
test(proptest): add 28 property tests for semantic_quality ranking metrics (wa-1u90p.7.1)

New proptest_semantic_quality.rs: metric bounds [0,1], perfect/zero-hit
ranking invariants, determinism, summary averaging, delta consistency,
threshold violation logic, ranked ID dedup/truncation, MRR reciprocal
rank invariant, RRF k parameter variation, serde roundtrips for all
types, and default corpus validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
